{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Karoshan rifles
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan rifles]] are weapons used by [[Karoshan]] soldiers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan rifles]] fire plasma bolts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
